    D

    DataHandler - Class in cz.cuni.mff.java
    Utility class for handling dataset loading, splitting, and exporting training metrics and ROC data from a (almost always) provided SimpleNN model.
    DataHandler() - Constructor for class cz.cuni.mff.java.DataHandler
     
    DataHandler.DataSet - Class in cz.cuni.mff.java
    Container for raw input features and corresponding class labels.
    DataHandler.SplitData - Class in cz.cuni.mff.java
    Container for split training and test datasets.
    DataSet(double[][], int[], int) - Constructor for class cz.cuni.mff.java.DataHandler.DataSet

    Evaluates the model on the given dataset and computes key classification metrics.

    Loads the model state from a file and replaces all internal parameters.

    Loads a trained model if some exists, otherwise trains a new model and saves it (if flag is set).

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class cz.cuni.mff.java.Main
    Program entry point.
    Main - Class in cz.cuni.mff.java
    The Main class is the main point for training/evaluating/plotting results of a neural network model.

    saveMetrics(SimpleNN, String) - Static method in class cz.cuni.mff.java.DataHandler
    Exports training metrics from a model to a CSV file.

    Saves the current model state to a file using Java serialization.

    Saves true labels and predicted scores from a model for ROC curve plotting.

    SimpleNN - Class in cz.cuni.mff.java
    A basic feedforward neural network that supports backpropagation, batch training, several hidden layers, and recording evaluation metrics.
    SimpleNN(int, int[], int, double) - Constructor for class cz.cuni.mff.java.SimpleNN
     
    SimpleNN.EvaluationResult - Class in cz.cuni.mff.java
    A simple container for evaluation results including loss, accuracy, precision, and recall.
